sections.paragraph:
- Original: Ἰάρεδ

- Transliteration: Iared

- Phonetic: ee-ar'-ed

- Definition: Jared = "descent"

1. one of the antediluvian patriarchs, the father of Enoch

- Origin: of hebrew origin H3382

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H3382]; Jared (that is Jered) an antediluvian: - Jared.
